summary: Fixed bar chart truncation in topics_ff.go to not cut mid-codepoint on the 3-byte █ character.
reason: bar[:40] sliced at byte 40, which lands inside the 14th █ codepoint (3 bytes each), producing invalid UTF-8 for any term appearing ≥14 times. Fixed by capping the repeat count at 40 runes instead of slicing bytes.
